content.body: zcorpan: your recent-ish commit e161310a modified the `internal ancestor origin objects list creation steps` (https://html.spec.whatwg.org/#internal-ancestor-origin-objects-list-creation-steps). Step 6 defines variable `container`, but it's never used.
